title: Persistent Mooshroom Flowers
description: Flowers given to brown mooshrooms will persist.
body:
# 🌼 Persistent Mooshroom Flowers

**Never re‑flower your brown mooshrooms again!**  
This lightweight mod lets a brown mooshroom keep the effect of the very first flower you give it—no matter how many times you milk it for suspicious stew.

---

## How it Works
1. **Feed** a flower to a **brown mooshroom**.  
2. The mooshroom is **“locked”** to that flower’s stew effect **permanently**.  
3. **Harvest** suspicious stew as often as you like—the flower is **not consumed**.

---

## Changing the Flower (Reset Method)
If you want to assign a different flower:

1. **Convert** the brown mooshroom into a **red mooshroom** (e.g., lightning).  
2. **Milk** the red mooshroom once to clear any residual stew data with a bowl.  
3. **Convert** it back into a **brown mooshroom**.  
4. Feed a **new flower** to lock in a new effect.

---

## Why You’ll Love It
- ✨ **Quality‑of‑Life** – carry one flower instead of stacks.  
- 🔧 **Simple** – no new items, blocks, or GUIs.  
- 🪶 **Lightweight** – minimal code; plays nicely with other mods.

---

Enjoy infinite, hassle‑free suspicious stew brewing! 🍲

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
